mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, display_name, avatar_url, bio, is_admin, created_at, updated_at FROM profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO profiles (id, user_id, display_name, avatar_url) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{userId}::uuid, #{displayName}, #{avatarUrl} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) WHERE is_deleted = false DO UPDATE SET display_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.display_name, profiles.display_name), avatar_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.avatar_url, profiles.avatar_url), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE profiles SET username = #{username}, display_name = #{displayName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND is_deleted = false
